message:
fix: quorum(0,N) identity, FQDN trailing dot, governor config + audit batch 389

Agent changes (all audited SOUND by SapphireHill):
- quorum.rs: quorum(0, N) returns empty winners immediately (additive identity)
- dns/resolver.rs: strip trailing root dot before 253-byte FQDN validation
- env_config.rs: enable_governor + governor_interval TOML config plumbing
- types/resource.rs: pool ownership tracking (checked_out + owner_pool_id)
- web/debug.rs: refresh interval in URL, connection improvements
- tests: WASM feasibility matrix expansion

Audit batch 389: 13 files across 20 commits, all SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
